note: Created BufferPinningAndSpanMarshallingTests.cs with 32 passing tests covering: buffer pinning address stability under GC pressure, ReadOnlySpan<byte> key marshalling via KeyMarshaller (correct pointer, offset, stackalloc), undersized/oversized key rejection, mock proxy validation of send/recv buffer contents, PeerList/GenerateKeypair buffer boundary handling, and empty buffer argument validation.
